variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16392 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16392 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16392 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P604273 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16392
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson PowerCore® filters? Genuine PowerCore filters provide superior protection and performance. • Lower initial restriction protects engine performance and fuel economy. • Greater filter capacity means longer filter life, fewer filter changes and less money spent on maintenance. • PowerCore filters have been meeting original equipment manufacturer specifications for 20+ years. • Reliable, leak resistant Radial Seal™ technology keeps the filter in place – even under heavy vibration.
